violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. Bags of raw ground beef patties were stored over containers of sauces in the cooler across from the chest freezer.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The crumb trays on the pizza ovens and bottom of the reach in cooler need to be cleaned.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Filters over the fryers in the hood system need to be cleaned.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
